description: Template for golden datasets — known-correct reference values for pipeline output validation. One file per spec at governance/golden-datasets/{spec}-golden.json.

format.source_description: Where these reference values come from (e.g., company 10-K filing, CMS published statistics)

records.entity: Entity identifier (e.g., company CIK, patient ID)
records.notes: Optional context about why this value is correct

rules.must_include_edge_cases: At least one record should test a known edge case from the EDA report
